description: All 5 values are sentinels (1e6). After filtering: empty list. DSR computation must not crash — returns None (deflated_sharpe_value stays None and falls through to the fallback or remains None if naive_sharpe is also sentinel).

derivation.note: filter_sortino_sentinels([1e6, 1e6, 1e6, 1e6, 1e6]) must return []. The DSR re-ranking block requires len(filtered) >= 2 to proceed. With 0 valid values, the block is skipped. deflated_sharpe_value remains None. The function must not raise.
